subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #029 Sin and Atonement
subcodes.first_line: Know that there are two natures in man: the material and the spiritual. The material nature is inherited from Adam
subcodes.first_line_orig: بدان که در انسان دو طبیعت است طبیعت جسمانیه و طبیعت روحانیه
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @original sin, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @symbolism, @The Holy Spirit, @transcendence; unknowability of God
